title: 6" Paracord Wrapped Compact Neck Chain Knife with Sheath (Neon Green) Tactical
description:
Be prepared for any situation with the Survival Paracord Wrapped Neck Chain Knife! Measuring in at only 6" long, this knife makes for perfect covert protection. Compact and lightweight, the knife comes with a sheath attached to a chain that can be hung around your neck for easy transportation. The bright green color makes it easy to spot. The knife handle is wrapped a highly durable survival paracord, which can be unraveled from the handle at any time in order to assist in an emergency situation. These blades also come with an impact resistant sheath that allows for quick release, so you'll have easy access to your blade at all times. The blade is 100% stainless steel, with a razor sharp edge. Don't let life catch you without one of these handy paracord wrapped neck knives!
